name: PETIQUE ST01030103 Pet Stroller, Green Camo, One Size
description: Petique's Pet Stroller makes strolling down the sidewalk a breeze Literally with ventilating mesh windows all around large EVA tires and double front wheels you and your pets will experience a smooth ride Going shopping or having a picnic? Our pet strollers have a large storage basket two large back pockets and a cup holder tray that holds up to two cups! Our chic design creates an all around great view of the outside world for your pets!
